response.global_analysis:
1. JSON Match: The lyrics match Ninomae Ina'nis's original song 'Bokura no Ina-dachi no Tsukurikata' (How to Make Our Ina-dachi / How to Make Our Takodachi). No pre-existing lyrics were in the reference, so we manually transcribed them based on the audio and on-screen text.
2. JSON Usage: The lyrics were fully transcribed manually from both English and Japanese vocal segments, utilizing the on-screen concert call-and-response text for precise Japanese spellings.
3. Timing & Pacing: Subtitles are timed to start precisely with vocal onset and truncated where necessary to align with the rapid pacing of the song. No subtitles are output during the initial instrumental/crowd intro segment.

subtitles.original: Enlivened by the powers that be
subtitles.english: Enlivened by the powers that be

subtitles.original: Governing the world round and round on an as-needed basis
subtitles.english: Governing the world round and round on an as-needed basis

subtitles.original: It's clear to me they still can't see
subtitles.english: It's clear to me they still can't see

subtitles.original: I'm just a normal girl
subtitles.english: I'm just a normal girl

subtitles.original: Empowered by ancient ones' call
subtitles.english: Empowered by ancient ones' call

subtitles.original: We're gonna be unstoppable, we're not at all
subtitles.english: We're gonna be unstoppable, we're not at all

subtitles.original: Nonsensical and mythical, a tension-lightening wave
subtitles.english: Nonsensical and mythical, a tension-lightening wave

subtitles.original: Let's give them a 1-8!
subtitles.english: Let's give them a 1-8!

subtitles.original: 1! 8! Tako da! 1! 8! Tako da!
subtitles.english: 1! 8! Tako da! 1! 8! Tako da!

subtitles.original: Ina! Ina! Ina! Ina! Ina! Ina!
subtitles.english: Ina! Ina! Ina! Ina! Ina! Ina!

subtitles.original: Sing with me!
subtitles.english: Sing with me!

subtitles.original: タコだちの世界を守るためにタコになろう！
subtitles.english: To protect the world of Takodachi, let's become Takos!

subtitles.original: 1! 8! Tako da! 1! 8! Tako da!
subtitles.english: 1! 8! Tako da! 1! 8! Tako da!

subtitles.original: Ina! Ina! Ina! Ina! Ina! Ina!
subtitles.english: Ina! Ina! Ina! Ina! Ina! Ina!

subtitles.original: いいタコになりますように
subtitles.english: May you become a good Tako,

subtitles.original: 皆騒ぎて踊りましょう
subtitles.english: everyone, make some noise and let's dance!

subtitles.original: Never mind what you could've been
subtitles.english: Never mind what you could've been

subtitles.original: We're talking evolution, leave it all to me
subtitles.english: We're talking evolution, leave it all to me

subtitles.original: Maybe just a touch of purple ink
subtitles.english: Maybe just a touch of purple ink

subtitles.original: What do you think?
subtitles.english: What do you think?

subtitles.original: It's a song you can't ignore
subtitles.english: It's a song you can't ignore

subtitles.original: The ancient ones are calling you to be so much more
subtitles.english: The ancient ones are calling you to be so much more

subtitles.original: Just put your hand in my hand and be reborn
subtitles.english: Just put your hand in my hand and be reborn

subtitles.original: In a blink
subtitles.english: In a blink

subtitles.original: Tell me what those legs are for
subtitles.english: Tell me what those legs are for

subtitles.original: 脳のイナが暴れだすのです！
subtitles.english: The Ina in your brain is running wild!

subtitles.original: You could use six legs more
subtitles.english: You could use six legs more

subtitles.original: いつも感謝ありがたや！
subtitles.english: Always grateful, thank you so much!

subtitles.original: We're all that's matching here
subtitles.english: We're all that's matching here

subtitles.original: えりえりいっちょ！
subtitles.english: Eri eri iccho!

subtitles.original: So keep your eyes to fight your fears
subtitles.english: So keep your eyes to fight your fears

subtitles.original: イナイナイナイナ！
subtitles.english: Ina Ina Ina Ina!

subtitles.original: Am I listening to my song, or am I striking a chord with you?
subtitles.english: Am I listening to my song, or am I striking a chord with you?

subtitles.original: Stringing you along, so that I'm making a follower of you
subtitles.english: Stringing you along, so that I'm making a follower of you

subtitles.original: 80 million strong, and we've still got some more to do
subtitles.english: 80 million strong, and we've still got some more to do

subtitles.original: Everybody shout...
subtitles.english: Everybody shout...

subtitles.original: WAH! To the nation!
subtitles.english: WAH! To the nation!

subtitles.original: In an ocean of motion, do I have you in my possession?
subtitles.english: In an ocean of motion, do I have you in my possession?

subtitles.original: I don't wanna hear you say that you're not in at your best yet
subtitles.english: I don't wanna hear you say that you're not in at your best yet

subtitles.original: If you're wavering, devotion is all I request yet
subtitles.english: If you're wavering, devotion is all I request yet

subtitles.original: So is it clear to you, that you're my dearest creation?
subtitles.english: So is it clear to you, that you're my dearest creation?

subtitles.original: Oya, oya. A cute little Takodachi found his way here.
subtitles.english: Well, well. A cute little Takodachi found his way here.

subtitles.original: Experimentation might be necessary.
subtitles.english: Experimentation might be necessary.

subtitles.original: Takos, we have to cook!
subtitles.english: Takos, we have to cook!

subtitles.original: いいタコダチの作り方
subtitles.english: How to make a good Takodachi

subtitles.original: ひっくり返して丸くして
subtitles.english: Flip them over, make them round...
